scripts.start: npm run check:deps && concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run _backend" "npm run _frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.preview: concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run preview"
